task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a vehicle profile named 'School Bus' of type 'Bus'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the vehicle profile list or creation screen with the name 'School Bus' and the vehicle type set to 'Bus' (often indicated by a bus icon or text).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'School Bus' profile is configured with Diesel fuel, 2020 production year, and Euro 6 emissions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the vehicle profile details/specifications screen showing Fuel type as 'Diesel', Production year as '2020', and Emission category as 'Euro 6' or 'EURO6'.

task_completion.description: Verify the setting to arrive on the correct side of the road is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the navigation or routing settings showing an option like 'Arrive in driving side' or 'Arrive in direction' toggled ON.

task_completion.description: Verify permanent lane guidance is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the navigation settings showing 'Lane guidance' toggled ON or set to permanently active.

task_completion.description: Verify ferry crossings are prohibited in the routing settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the route avoidance settings showing 'Ferries' toggled to be avoided (usually a switch turned ON under an 'Avoid' section).

task_completion.description: Verify the measurement units are set to miles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the regional or display settings showing the distance units configured to 'Miles' or 'mph'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Sygic app's graphical user interface to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sygic app interface, menus, and settings screens being navigated manually.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or edit configuration files directly to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal emulators (like Termux) or text editors modifying preference XML files in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the settings are applied within the actual Sygic GPS Navigation application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches the Sygic GPS Navigation visual style, rather than a web browser search or a different mock application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring Sygic GPS Navigation. Vehicle Profile: Name must be exactly 'School Bus', Type: BUS, Fuel: DIESEL, Production Year: 2020, Emission Category: EURO 6 (or EURO6). Settings to enable: 'Arrive in driving side' (or similar arrive-in-direction setting), 'Lane guidance', and 'Avoid ferries'. Regional settings: Distance units must be set to Miles.
